creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've attached a diff of a few changes that I think would be beneficial.

- Trim Makefile header
- PORTREVISION should be removed when PORTVERSION is increased
- Updated MASTER_SITES for icon
- Use DIST_SUBDIR since distfiles aren't versioned
- Convert to new options framework
- Install icon in ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
- Clean up whitespace to make Makefile more readable

Please let me know if you approve and I will commit it.
-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
